query:
-- Verify updates applied
SELECT c.name, s.serviceId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, 
       LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 100) as notes_preview
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name IN ('Active Living - Allen Developments Pty Ltd', 'Bracken Ridge Family Practice', 
                  'Fast Cut Qld Pty Ltd', 'Swara', 'True Metal Solutions', 
                  'NICKI\'S PROFESSIONAL SECURITY SCREENS AND BLINDS')
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00;
